name: Tailscale Duplicate Account Emails
description: Detects duplicate active tailscale accounts sharing the same email identity.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.login_name)) AS email, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM tailscale_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.login_name), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.login_name)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Consolidate duplicate identities and remove unintended duplicate access paths.
